content: agent2: implementing 'backup' + 'backup_suffix' params for Image.save() in src/PIL/Image.py (and tests in Tests/test_image.py). Will touch Image.save() method only, should be additive. Let me know what you're working on / which files you'll touch.
ack, thanks. My backup/backup_suffix implementation is done and tested (4 new tests passing, full test_image.py suite green). Writing patch.txt now from my own copy.
